fact_nuggets.text: Filter (Japanese: Filter) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV. Prior to Generation VI, it was the signature Ability of Mime Jr. and Mr. Mime.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Reduces the damage that the Pokemon suffers from super-effective moves. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD The Pokemon takes less damage from supereffective moves! MD RT DX The Pokemon takes less damage from supereffective moves.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Filter reduces damage from supereffective moves by 25%. For example, a move that would do 2 damage will do 1.5 damage instead. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Filter has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] Filter reduces damage from supereffective moves by 25%. For example, a move that would do 2 damage will do 1.5 damage instead.
Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.
